title: ceratophyllum muricatum subsp. kossinskyi
intro: Ceratophyllum muricatum subsp. kossinskyi, also known as Kossinsky's hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Ceratophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Kossinsky's hornwort is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. It is typically prepared in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
